task: pick rxbar blueberry from top drawer and place on counter
raw:
Scene: rxbar_blueberry, drawer, counter, bowl, chips_bag
Step 1: reach(rxbar_blueberry)
  affordance_region: the rxbar blueberry in the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, rxbar_blueberry, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, rxbar_blueberry) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(rxbar_blueberry)
  affordance_region: the rxbar blueberry in the drawer
  contact: holding(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(rxbar_blueberry)
Step 3: transport(rxbar_blueberry -> counter)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the counter
  spatial: above(rxbar_blueberry, counter, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(rxbar_blueberry)
  done_when: above(rxbar_blueberry, counter, 0.05)
Step 4: place(rxbar_blueberry -> counter)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the counter
  contact: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, counter) [completion]; released(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  pose: stable(rxbar_blueberry) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, counter) AND released(rxbar_blueberry) AND stable(rxbar_blueberry)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rxbar blueberry in the drawer
the rxbar blueberry in the drawer
the empty area on the counter
the empty area on the counter
steps.done_when: surface_contact(rxbar_blueberry, counter) AND released(rxbar_blueberry) AND stable(rxbar_blueberry)
